title: Use These 17 Claude Plugins, It Will Make You 10x Better.
summary: Chase AI reviews 17 Claude plugins, CLIs, and skills organized by category: design, productivity, and data. The video covers tools like Playwright CLI, Firecrawl, GitHub CLI, and others that integrate with Claude Code to enhance development workflows.
writeup: Chase AI walks through 17 plugins, CLIs, and agent skills that integrate with Claude Code, sorted into three categories: design, productivity, and data. Featured tools include the Playwright CLI, Firecrawl, and the GitHub CLI, each connected to Claude Code to extend development workflows. The framing centers on how these integrations expand what Claude Code can do across browser automation, web scraping, and repository management.
